exploration_notes: Created EvaluationError type in eval_error.go implementing error/Unwrap interfaces with namespace, flag key, and phase context. Wrapped all storage errors in evaluation.go (Variant, Boolean, boolean, Batch methods) and legacy_evaluator.go (Evaluate method) with appropriate phase labels: 'flag' for GetFlag, 'rollouts' for GetEvaluationRollouts and boolean constraint matching, 'rules' for GetEvaluationRules and variant constraint matching, and 'distributions' for GetEvaluationDistributions.
